power_pitcher.name: Power Pitcher
power_pitcher.description: High velocity generates strikeouts. Blows fastballs past hitters with elite spin and whiff rates.
power_pitcher.pitch_reasoning: Slider (control primary, rotation secondary) as T1 chase pitch. Splitter (stuff+presence primary, control+rotation secondary) as T1 elite whiff pitch. Changeup (rotation primary) for lowest BABIP and speed differential.

control_artist.name: Control Artist
control_artist.description: Elite command keeps runners off base. Minimizes walks and hit batters with pinpoint accuracy and persuasion.
control_artist.pitch_reasoning: Slider (control primary, persuasion secondary) as T1 chase pitch hitting two priority stats. Cutter (persuasion primary) for weak contact. Knuckle-curve (accuracy primary, persuasion secondary) as T1 pitch hitting two priority stats. Changeup for BABIP suppression.

groundball_machine.name: Groundball Machine
groundball_machine.description: Induces ground balls with elite stuff. Turns batters into double play candidates.
groundball_machine.pitch_reasoning: Sinker (highest GB rate) and knuckle-curve (high GB + stuff pitch) as primary. Changeup (lowest BABIP) and splitter (2nd highest GB) for variety. All are strong Stuff pitches.

deception_master.name: Deception Master
deception_master.description: Freezes batters with elite deception. Gets called strikes as hitters watch pitches go by. Reads and adapts.
deception_master.pitch_reasoning: Sweeper (rotation+deception primary) hitting two priority stats. Changeup (rotation primary) for lowest BABIP. Slider (control primary, rotation secondary) as T1 chase pitch. Curveball for highest CSW rate.

workhorse.name: Workhorse
workhorse.description: Innings eater with stamina and guts. Goes deep into games, stays effective late, and refuses to leave the mound.
workhorse.pitch_reasoning: Slider (control primary) as T1 pitch. Cutter for weak contact. Changeup for BABIP suppression. Splitter as T1 elite whiff pitch. Stamina/guts/defiance are role stats; pitches chosen for control+rotation alignment.

damage_control.name: Damage Control
damage_control.description: Control and stuff limit extra base hits. When contact happens, it goes nowhere.
damage_control.pitch_reasoning: Splitter (stuff+presence primary, elite chase rate + GB). Changeup (lowest BABIP). Cutter and slider for weak contact. All generate weak contact.

chase_specialist.name: Chase Specialist
chase_specialist.description: Gets batters to fish with persuasion and guts. Expands the zone effectively.
chase_specialist.pitch_reasoning: Slider (control primary, persuasion secondary) hitting two priority stats. Cutter (persuasion primary) for weak contact. Splitter as T1 elite chase/whiff pitch. Knuckle-curve with persuasion secondary for chase upside.

elite_reliever.name: Elite Reliever
elite_reliever.description: Maximum dominance over short stints. Velocity, stuff, and deception for 1-2 inning dominance. Skip stamina entirely.
elite_reliever.pitch_reasoning: Splitter (stuff+presence primary) as T1 elite whiff pitch. Sweeper (rotation+deception primary) for weak contact. Slider as T1 chase pitch. Tight 3-pitch mix for short stints.

breaking_ball_specialist.name: Breaking Ball Specialist
breaking_ball_specialist.description: Masters curveball and slider with elite rotation. Spin dominates hitters with movement and deception.
breaking_ball_specialist.pitch_reasoning: Slider (control primary, rotation secondary) hitting two priority stats. Changeup (rotation primary, presence secondary) for lowest BABIP. Curveball (presence primary) for highest CSW. Sweeper (rotation primary) for weak contact.

knuckleball_artist.name: Knuckleball Artist
knuckleball_artist.description: Unpredictable with knuckle-curve focus. Movement and deception over power.
knuckleball_artist.pitch_reasoning: Knuckle-curve (stuff primary, rotation secondary) hitting two priority stats. Sweeper (rotation+deception primary) hitting two priority stats. Changeup for lowest BABIP. Splitter (stuff primary) as T1 elite whiff pitch.

guts_monster.name: Guts Monster
guts_monster.description: Extreme guts investment overpowers hitters through pure mental toughness. Guts multiplies everything else.
guts_monster.pitch_reasoning: Slider (rotation secondary) as T1 chase pitch. Changeup (rotation primary) for lowest BABIP. Sweeper (rotation primary) for weak contact. Guts is a multiplier stat; pitches chosen for rotation alignment.

fastball_command.name: Fastball Command
fastball_command.description: Elite velocity paired with pinpoint command. Blows fastballs by hitters with precise location.
fastball_command.pitch_reasoning: Slider (control primary) as T1 pitch. Cutter for weak contact. Fastball (presence primary, control+accuracy secondary) as zone anchor. Knuckle-curve (accuracy primary) as T1 pitch hitting accuracy priority.
